_comment: REL-5 log-based COUNTER metric feeding SLI-3 (AI success rate). Source = REL-2's logger.info('model_call', { route, provider, outcome, attempt, latencyMs }) emit (app/src/server/logger.ts shape). Apply: gcloud logging metrics create arbor_model_call_outcome --config-from-file=THIS_FILE --project $PROJECT_ID. REL-2 must be deployed first so 'model_call' lines exist. Labels are pulled from jsonPayload; keep cardinality bounded (outcome/provider/route are all enums).
name: arbor_model_call_outcome
description: Per-attempt Arbor model call outcomes (REL-2 model_call log event). outcome in {ok,retry,timeout,circuit_open,error}; provider in {gemini_dev,vertex_gemini,vertex_claude}. Feeds the AI-success SLO (REL-5).
